name: MysqlClient
description: Re-exports all named exports from the "./MysqlClient.ts" module as `MysqlClient`.

name: MysqlMigrator
description: Re-exports all named exports from the "./MysqlMigrator.ts" module as `MysqlMigrator`.

name: TypeId
description: Runtime type identifier used to mark `MysqlClient` values.

name: MysqlClient
description:
Service tag for the mysql2 SQL client service.

**When to use**

Use to access or provide a mysql2 client through the Effect context.

name: make
description: Creates a scoped MySQL client backed by a managed mysql2 pool, verifying connectivity and supporting streaming queries through mysql2 query streams.
signature: declare const make: (options: MysqlClientConfig) => Effect.Effect<MysqlClient, SqlError, Scope | Reactivity.Reactivity>

name: layerConfig
description: Creates a layer from a `Config`-wrapped MySQL client configuration, providing both `MysqlClient` and `SqlClient`.
signature: declare const layerConfig: (config: Config.Wrap<MysqlClientConfig>) => Layer.Layer<MysqlClient | Client.SqlClient, Config.ConfigError | SqlError>

name: layer
description: Creates a layer from a concrete MySQL client configuration, providing both `MysqlClient` and `SqlClient`.
signature: declare const layer: (config: MysqlClientConfig) => Layer.Layer<MysqlClient | Client.SqlClient, Config.ConfigError | SqlError>

name: makeCompiler
description: Creates the MySQL statement compiler, using `?` placeholders and backtick-escaped identifiers.
signature: declare const makeCompiler: (transform?: (_: string) => string) => Statement.Compiler

name: MysqlClient
description: mysql2-backed SQL client service, extending `SqlClient` with its runtime type marker and client configuration.

name: MysqlClientConfig
description: Configuration for a mysql2 client, including connection URI or connection fields, pool options, span attributes, and query/result name transforms.
signature:
export interface MysqlClientConfig {
  /**
   * Connection URI. Setting this will override the other connection options
   */
  readonly url?: Redacted.Redacted | undefined

  readonly host?: string | undefined
  readonly port?: number | undefined
  readonly database?: string | undefined
  readonly username?: string | undefined
  readonly password?: Redacted.Redacted | undefined

  readonly maxConnections?: number | undefined
  readonly connectionTTL?: Duration.Input | undefined

  readonly poolConfig?: Mysql.PoolOptions | undefined

  readonly spanAttributes?: Record<string, unknown> | undefined

  readonly transformResultNames?: ((str: string) => string) | undefined
  readonly transformQueryNames?: ((str: string) => string) | undefined
}

name: TypeId
description: Type-level identifier used to mark `MysqlClient` values.

name: run
description: Runs SQL migrations using the configured `SqlClient`, returning the migrations that were applied.
signature: declare const run: <R2 = never>({ loader, schemaDirectory, table }: Migrator.MigratorOptions<R2>) => Effect.Effect<ReadonlyArray<readonly [id: number, name: string]>, Migrator.MigrationError | SqlError, Client.SqlClient | R2>

name: layer
description: Creates a layer that runs the configured SQL migrations during layer construction.
signature: declare const layer: <R>(options: Migrator.MigratorOptions<R>) => Layer.Layer<never, Migrator.MigrationError | SqlError, Client.SqlClient | R>

name: "effect/unstable/sql/Migrator"
description: Re-exports all named exports from the "effect/unstable/sql/Migrator" module.
